title: The Model Performance Trade-off: Underfitting vs. Overfitting
description: A graph illustrating the relationship between model complexity and error, showing the optimal balance to avoid underfitting and overfitting.
relationships: As model complexity increases, training error decreases continuously
As model complexity increases, validation error decreases initially but then increases
The 'Sweet Spot' is the point of complexity where validation error is minimized, balancing bias and variance
